justification: The diff performs a comprehensive Jakarta EE namespace migration (javax -> jakarta) and upgrades Hibernate to 6.5.3, but fails to leverage Java 21 idioms beyond a single pattern-matching instanceof in User.java and a ThreadLocalRandom swap in Session.java. The pom.xml changes are coherent, though the addition of Spring Boot 3.3.13 and Jakarta EE 10 dependencies introduces significant version churn that may not be strictly necessary for a Java 21 migration.
